  "findings": [
    "PEX crimp ring failed the go/no-go gauge test, indicating an under-crimped or over-crimped joint."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Cut out the non-compliant crimp joint.",
    "Calibrate the crimping tool according to manufacturer specifications.",
    "Install a new PEX crimp ring and fitting, then re-test with the go/no-go gauge."
  ],
  "rationale": "A crimp ring that fails the go/no-go gauge test does not meet manufacturer installation specifications or IPC requirements. It represents an improper joint that is highly susceptible to leaking or blowing off under pressure.",
  "references": [
    "IPC Section 605.17.2 (Plastic pipe joints)",
    "ASTM F1807",
    "Manufacturer Installation Instructions for Metal Insert Fittings utilizing Copper Crimp Rings"
  ]
}
